articles.title: Italian Prime Minister Georgia Meloni tells G7 leaders that she quit smoking one month ago
articles.description: Italian Prime Minister Giorgia Meloni told fellow G7 leaders on Tuesday she had quit smoking. While waiting for US President Donald Trump, French President Emmanuel Macron and Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy to arrive for a meeting, G7 leaders struck up a conversation about smoking.

articles.title: Kanlaon Volcano releases ash for the 20th time
articles.description: MANILA, Philippines — Kanlaon Volcano in Negros Island emitted ash on Tuesday afternoon, marking its 20th time of doing so in just a day, the Philippine Institute of Volcanology and Seismology (Phivolcs) said. Phivolcs made the pronouncement after posting camera footage of the volcano’s latest ash emission event at 5:21 p.m. on Tuesday. READ: 15

articles.title: Thousands of people rattled after 6.7-magnitude earthquake shook Sulawesi Island causing damage and injuries
articles.description: A 6.7 magnitude earthquake shook part of central Indonesia's Sulawesi island Tuesday, injuring at least eight people, causing scattered damage and rattling residents of a city devastated by a quake and tsunami eight years ago.

articles.title: DENR tells public to avoid areas with coastal uplift

articles.title: MAGA Melts Down at the Weather Channel for Forecasting Weather
articles.description: Evan Vucci / Evan Vucci/REUTERS MAGA devotees are throwing a tantrum after the Weather Channel correctly warned of stormy weather for President Donald Trump’s UFC birthday bash. The cage fight extravaganza Trump hosted on the White House lawn for his 80th birthday on Sunday was nearly derailed by volatile weather conditions, which many forecasters had been warning about for days. The event ultimately took place, but only after the fights were delayed by roughly 45 minutes after the National Weather Service issued a severe thunderstorm watch for the Washington, D.C., area. Read more at The Daily Beast.

articles.title: Stocks open sharply higher on tentative deal for end to Iran war
articles.description: Stock markets are rallying worldwide and oil prices eased after the United States and Iran reached a tentative deal to extend their ceasefire and reopen the Strait of Hormuz to get the global flow of crude going again.

articles.title: Janis: An alternative pop transition
articles.description: Janis is an alternative pop and soul artist who will this week be releasing a stunning new album, "Cry With Us", through which she draws from her experience as a trans woman. She popped by the FRANCE 24 studios to chat to Marjorie Hache and share more about her story and evolution from teenage pop sensation Sliimy in the late 2000s to alternative pop artist. We also take a look at new releases by French star Mylène Farmer and British band Muse.

articles.title: Phivolcs: Ground deformation observed in parts of Sarangani, GenSan
articles.description: MANILA – Ground deformation have been observed in Sarangani and General Santos City areas following the magnitude 7.8 earthquake that jolted parts of Mindanao last June 8, the head of the Philippine Institute of Volcanology and Seismology (Phivolcs) said on Monday. “Based on the aerial and ground assessment, landslides, tension cracks, road subsidence, and rockfalls were seen in several areas in Sarangani, Davao Occidental and General Santos City, Glan and Malapatan, Sarangani, portions of General Santos and T’boli Road, as well as some sections of Sarangani-Davao Occidental Coastal Road,” Phivolcs Director Teresito Bacolcol said in a Bagong Pilipinas Ngayon interview. [...]... Keep on reading: Phivolcs: Ground deformation observed in parts of Sarangani, GenSan
